description: Deliberately invoked (never automatic) orchestrator that builds deep, code-verified knowledge documents for every distinct business flow across the whole project, in plain, simple English with jargon explained inline or via a shared glossary. Discovers flows automatically (repo-map.md/event-map.md, domain folders, named processes) rather than requiring one flow name per run. Checks .claude/knowledge/flows/ for docs that already exist and asks, per flow, whether to update in place or write a new version alongside the existing one. Each flow gets: entity/data model, status vocabulary, phase-by-phase narrative with if/else decision trees, a full Event Ledger, retry/failure semantics, a background-job catalog, Mermaid diagrams, and a diagnostic guide. Invoke with /smdg-build-knowledge (optionally naming specific flows to limit scope for a follow-up run).
